item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 15,614 words across all notes.

item.title: Target joint
item.description: General Depending on where you are currently positioned you need to consider different joints as your primary target to pass or control.

item.title: Four points
item.description: General While opponent is on their back (Side control & Mount) consider that they have four point of control.

item.title: Technique circle
item.description: General Judo concept that is based on having 8 directional “compass” and all the takedowns and throws can be performed in certain directions.

item.title: Sacrifice throw
item.description: General Subtype of throws where you also fall on the mat.

item.title: Tugging motion
item.description: Generally static motion is easier to match and defend with similar force in the opposite direction.

item.title: Sacrifice elbow drop
item.description: General Steps Ideally obtain: Left hand grips opponent sleeve Right hand grips cross collar Push on collar with stiff arm Sleeve pulling downward Inverse the motion to backward Drop to “aitajuoksija” with legs Pull back on the collar hand and land on elbow Move sleeve grip to opponents thigh Turn ov...

item.title: Belt and Sleeve
item.description: General Grip position from Standing where you have opponents sleeve controller and extended and a grip on their belt.

item.title: Sumi Gaeshi
item.description: General A type of Sacrifice throw originating from Judo.
